records.ety: [OE. stede, AS. stēda a stud-horse, war horse, fr. stōd a stud of breeding steeds; akin to G. stute a mare, Icel. stedda, stōð, a stud. √163. See Stud of horses.]

defs: A horse, especially a spirited horse for state or war; -- used chiefly in poetry or stately prose.
quotes: Mounted upon a hot and fiery steed.
